prompt: Local file old/deprecated.js deleted. Propagate to remote. DRY RUN.

assertions.name: issues_ssh_rm
assertions.text: Response contains a CMD line with ssh running rm -f against the correct remote path

assertions.name: no_scp_upload
assertions.text: Response does NOT contain any scp command for deprecated.js

assertions.name: summary_reports_deletion
assertions.text: Summary mentions the file was deleted on the remote
